subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-11
subcodes.first_line: How are the Believers? Are they enkindled? Are they brilliant stars in the Assembly? Do they serve the Cause of God in Love and Harmony? In the meetings of Believers is there a real quickening, or is it cold?
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
